title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Zomato

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Zomato
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Zomato in Ludhiana offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
